name: Shared Market
description: Publish listings and connect buyers with sellers over P2P; contact and delivery details are encrypted for the seller.

en.name: Shared Market
en.description: Publish listings and connect buyers with sellers over P2P; contact and delivery details are encrypted for the seller.
en.privacy: Listings and seller profiles are public. Buyer contact, delivery, and note fields are encrypted in WASM for the seller only.
en.notice: Collection views may differ while the mesh is partitioned. RoomHash only introduces buyers and sellers; it does not process payments.

zh-CN.name: 共享市场
zh-CN.description: 通过 P2P 发布商品并撮合买卖双方；买家联系方式与交付信息仅加密发送给卖家。
zh-CN.privacy: 商品与卖家资料公开；买家联系方式、交付方式和备注会在 WASM 内加密，仅卖家可读取。
zh-CN.notice: Mesh 分区期间，不同节点收集到的市场视图可能不同。RoomHash 只负责信息展示与搭线，不处理线上付款。

privacy: Listings and seller profiles are public. Buyer contact, delivery, and note fields are encrypted in WASM for the seller only.
notice: Collection views may differ while the mesh is partitioned. RoomHash only introduces buyers and sellers; it does not process payments.
